methods.method_name: Advance a test clock in the Sandbox environment to simulate changes and events based on the incremented virtual time.
Associate items to a user, with support for up to 100 items. If an item is already associated with another user, it will be reassigned to the target user.
Authorize a transfer by creating a transfer authorization using the `/transfer/authorization/create` endpoint.
Cancel a bank transfer.
Cancel a recurring transfer.
Cancel a refund before submission to the payment network.
Cancel a transfer authorization.
Cancel a transfer.
Check a user's Plaid Network status to determine eligibility for a streamlined experience like Layer.
Check a user's Plaid Network status.
Check eligibility for digital income verification before initializing a Link session for optimized conversion.
Check income verification eligibility and optimize conversion for digital income verification by calling the `/credit/payroll_income/precheck` endpoint before initializing a Link session.
Compute Protect Trust Index Score and retrieve fraud attributes.
Create a fraud report for a given Beacon User.
Create a Hosted Link session.
Create a Link Token for initializing Plaid Link, required for various Link flows like updating credentials or Identity Verification.
Create a Link token for Layer to initialize the Link SDK.
Create a new bank transfer as a processor.
Create a new business verification to check a business's identity and risk profile.
Create a new end customer for a Plaid reseller.
Create a new end customer record for a Plaid reseller.
Create a new funding account for an originator.
Create a new Identity Verification for a user based on specified criteria and template.
Create a new originator and receive the originator client ID.
Create a new originator for Transfer for Platforms customers with the provided information and legal terms agreement.
Create a new payment profile and link it to your account for future transactions.
Create a payment consent to initiate payments on behalf of the user with specified limitations and constraints.
Create a payment recipient for payment initiation within SEPA or UK for standing orders. Use `bacs` in the UK and `iban` in the EU.
Create a payment to a recipient, supporting one-time or recurring payments in multiple currencies, with specific rules for GBP payments.
Create a person associated with an originator and submit personal identification information.
Create a processor token for integration with Plaid's partners, or bank account tokens for Stripe partnerships.
Create a Protect report to document fraud incidents, investigation outcomes, or risk events, enhancing network security.
Create a public token for Plaid Link to use in update mode, replacing the deprecated endpoint.
Create a recurring transfer with the Transfer API.
Create a refund for a transfer within the past 180 days using the `/transfer/refund/create` endpoint.
Create a relay token to securely share an Asset Report with a partner client through Plaid's API.
Create a review for an entity watchlist screening to assess compliance reports on potential hits found by Plaid.
Create a review for an individual watchlist screening.
Create a Stripe bank account token for Plaid-Stripe integrations.
Create a test clock with a virtual timeline for testing recurring transfers in the Sandbox environment.
Create a test item and processor token for Sandbox testing.
Create a test Item with a valid public_token using the `/sandbox/public_token/create` endpoint.
Create a third-party user token for accessing user data with a specified client.
Create a token for Apex bank account integration with Plaid.
Create a transfer intent object to invoke the Transfer UI.
Create a user with Plaid products, providing a single token for accessing user data and enabling features like Plaid Check and Income Verification.
Create a watchlist screening for an entity to check customers against defined watchlists in the associated program.
Create a watchlist screening for an individual.
Create an Asset Report to retrieve financial data by initiating the process through the `/asset_report/create` endpoint.
Create an Audit Copy of an Asset Report to share with third parties like Fannie Mae for Day 1 Certainty™ program.
Create an Audit Copy token for sharing Asset or Income Report data with Government Sponsored Entities (GSE) or Fannie Mae.
Create an e-wallet with the provided details and receive the newly created e-wallet object as the response.
Create and scan a Beacon User against your Beacon Program's settings to check for duplicates and fraud reports.
Create autofill for an Identity Verification based on phone number, date of birth, and country of residence.
Create payment token for initiating payment flow using Plaid's deprecated endpoint `/payment_initiation/payment/token/create`.
Create sandbox transactions for an existing item in the Sandbox environment using the `/sandbox/transactions/create` endpoint.
Create transaction categorization rules for items' transactions.
Delete an Asset Report to invalidate access and prevent creating new reports or accessing data.
Deposit funds into a Plaid Ledger balance.
Download a single statement PDF in binary format and verify its integrity with a SHA 256 checksum.
Enable a Plaid reseller's end customer in the Production environment.
Enable a Plaid reseller's end customer in the Production environment.
Enhance locally-held transaction data with enriched information.
Enrich locally-held transaction data.
Evaluate a planned ACH transaction to receive a risk assessment and additional risk signals.
Evaluate a planned ACH transaction to receive a risk assessment and additional risk signals.
Evaluate the risk of a bank account.
Exchange a Link public token for an API access token and store the associated item ID.
Exchange an OAuth `link_correlation_id` for a `link_token` for payment initiation products.
Execute a single payment using consent.
Execute a transaction with an e-wallet, specifying debit, credit, idempotency key, amount, and reference.
Fetch a list of e-wallets in descending order of creation.
Fetch a specific e-wallet transaction.
Fetch an e-wallet including the current balance.
Fetch summary of recurring transaction streams, including insights on expenses, deposits, categories, merchants, and amounts.
Filter Asset Report to include only specific accounts by providing account IDs to create a new subset report.
Force a Sandbox Item into an error state to simulate invalid login, useful for testing Plaid Link's update mode flow.
Force Sandbox User's items into an error state to simulate invalid logins, aiding in testing Plaid Link's update mode flow.
Generate or refresh an OAuth access token with `/oauth/token`.
Generate Plaid-hosted onboarding UI URL for due diligence and terms agreement.
Get a Beacon Report Syndication by providing the Beacon Report Syndication ID.
Get an individual watchlist screening program.
Get detailed information about a user event, including Trust Index score and fraud attributes.
Import an Item via Plaid Exchange Integration.
Initiate a new bank transfer.
Initiate a new transfer.
Initiate income verification process and obtain income verification ID for creating a Link instance.

Initiate on-demand extraction to fetch latest transactions for a Plaid Item with optional `/transactions/refresh` endpoint.

Initiate on-demand extraction to fetch statements for provided dates.
Initiate on-demand extraction to refresh user financial data for Financial Insights bundle, updating transactions, investments, and liabilities.
Initiate on-demand extraction to refresh user's transactions in the Transactions bundle.
Invalidate a relay token to restrict access to specific reports.
Invalidate an Audit Copy token to restrict access to Report data.
Invalidate the access token associated with an item to rotate and secure it.

Opt-in an Item to Signal Transaction Scores for accurate data collection and computation.
Receive FDX event notifications via webhook.

Refresh investment data on-demand for the newest holdings and transactions.

Remove an Item from the system, invalidating associated tokens and ending subscription billing.
Remove items from a user by providing their ID or token. This action permanently deletes associated items.

Retrieve transfer product usage metrics.

Retrieve user account data, including identity and access tokens for Plaid Layer, allowing users to edit prefilled identity data before sharing.
Retrieve user identity and information by user ID. This endpoint is for users created without a user token.
